description: Style NoteCrafted by skilled Indian craftsmen, murcia bags use the finest materials in their products. This stylishly silhouetted bag embodies the essence of the modern Indian woman - unapologetically fashionable. If you're looking for a bag with class and quality, you can expand your collection with this accessory.Product DetailsBlack handbag, stitched detailing on the upper, metallic plate branding, one zipped compartment, two magnetic closured compartments, two short handles woven through metallic loops, , legs at the baseMaterial and CareLeatheretteWipe with cloth when requiredSizeLength: 27 cmWidth: 34 cmDepth: 17 cm
